name: Parmesan Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups grated parmesan cheese, divided (5 oz.)
2 cans refrigerated crescent dinner rolls, (8 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1 Mix cream cheese and 1 cup parmesan cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2 Separate the crescent rolls into 8 rectangles. Seal the perforations.
3 Spread 3 tablespoons of the cream cheese mixture on each rectangle. Top with red pepper and parsley.
4 Fold the long end up over the filling to the center. Fold up again to enclose the remaining filling.
5 Cut each into equal size squares. Place, seam-side down, on a cookie sheet. Sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
6 Bake at 350°F for 13 to 15 minutes or until golden brown. Makes 32 bites.
7 Variation: Substitute pepperoni and oregano for red bell peppers and fresh parsley.
